results.overall_itc_remark: 2 of 5 line(s) need attention. Line 1 (FIRE BRICKS) — Needs review: “FIRE BRICKS” may fall under the rule on goods or services used to construct immovable property on your own account (Section 17(5)(d)); the bill doesn't establish the actual use, so confirm before claiming.; Line 4 (END SKEW BLOCK) — Needs review: “END SKEW BLOCK” may fall under the rule on goods or services used to construct immovable property on your own account (Section 17(5)(d)); the bill doesn't establish the actual use, so confirm before claiming.
results.overall_itc_remark_plain: Needs review — 3 of 5 line(s) are fine; 2 need a closer look. On the line(s) below the bill doesn't show how the item was used, and the use is what decides whether the credit is allowed. Blocked only when the item is used to construct immovable property on your own account — not when it's for resale or part of plant & machinery (§17(5)(d)). Line 1 (FIRE BRICKS, ₹2,02,606.03): Use not stated on the bill. Line 4 (END SKEW BLOCK, ₹411.40): Use not stated on the bill.
overall_itc_next_steps: If the item was used for resale or as part of plant & machinery, the credit is allowed — tag the line eligible.
If it was used for construction-related use, the credit is blocked (§17(5)(d)) — tag the line ineligible.

results.overall_itc_remark: 1 of 2 line(s) need attention. Line 1 (TILES(300X300)) — Needs review: “TILES(300X300)” may fall under the rule on goods or services used to construct immovable property on your own account (Section 17(5)(d)); the bill doesn't establish the actual use, so confirm before claiming.
results.overall_itc_remark_plain: Needs review — 1 of 2 line(s) are fine; 1 need a closer look. On the line(s) below the bill doesn't show how the item was used, and the use is what decides whether the credit is allowed. Blocked only when the item is used to construct immovable property on your own account — not when it's for resale or part of plant & machinery (§17(5)(d)). Line 1 (TILES(300X300), ₹13,770): Use not stated on the bill.
overall_itc_next_steps: If the item was used for resale or as part of plant & machinery, the credit is allowed — tag the line eligible.
If it was used for construction-related use, the credit is blocked (§17(5)(d)) — tag the line ineligible.
